arts.sum: Yossi Benayoun, who played in the Premier League from 2005 to 2014, was at home with his family in Israel when a grenade was launched through their door and caused an explosion

arts.ttl: Man Utd make SENSATIONAL €200m bid for Real Madrid superstar
arts.sum: Vinicius Jr has been a key target for the Saudi Pro League over the past year or so, with multiple reports that there is a very real possibility he could move to Saudi Arabia this summer. Relevo report that the Real Madrid superstar has a €1 BILLION contract offer from Saudi Arabia.

arts.ttl: Arsenal starter ‘prioritises’ summer move to Barcelona – Aiming high
arts.sum: Arsenal’s Thomas Partey ‘prioritises’ a move to Barcelona in the summer window. That’s according to Tuesday’s edition of Mundo Deportivo, and they also cover Barcelona’s stance on signing the midfielder. The Ghana international has less than three months left on his contract at Arsenal.
